backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the ANC Marketplace backend, defining core data types (UserProfile, Product, EcomOrder, Lesson, etc.) and including blob storage mixin, access control, Stripe, and HTTP outcall integrations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two features—displaying the Zapier webhook URL in the admin payments panel and fixing admin access control recognition—to their relevant source files and component dependencies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Aggregated one-line summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and notable changes of each component, page, and hook in the React frontend.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the ANC Marketplace React app, including SEO meta tags, Open Graph/Twitter cards, PWA manifest link, favicon references, and the root div with main.tsx module script.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest for ANC Marketplace defining app name, icons at multiple resolutions, display mode, theme colors, and screenshot metadata for installable web app support.
frontend/public/policies/marketplace-pol: Markdown document outlining the ANC Marketplace policy (v1.0), covering user responsibilities, service fees ($5/sale), payment processing, prohibited activities, and dispute resolution.
Privacy policy for ANC Electronics N More describing data collection practices, usage, third-party sharing (including Authorize.net), user rights, and contact information.
Returns policy document detailing 30-day return eligibility, non-returnable items, the return process, refund timelines, and restocking fees for ANC Marketplace purchases.
frontend/public/policies/shipping-policy: Markdown document outlining ANC Electronics N More's shipping policy, covering methods, costs, processing times, tracking, international shipping, restrictions, and lost/damaged package procedures.
frontend/public/policies/terms-and-condi: Markdown document defining ANC Marketplace's terms and conditions, including eligibility, account rules, seller/buyer responsibilities, payment terms, liability limits, and dispute resolution.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application file that configures TanStack Router with all page routes, wraps the app in QueryClientProvider, ThemeProvider, VoiceSettingsProvider, and renders the Layout with a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/accounts/A: Admin panel component that fetches and displays all registered users in a searchable, filterable table with role badges, balance, and join date columns.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminAcces: Displays admin access links (app URL, admin URL, owner email) with copy-to-clipboard and open-in-new-tab functionality.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminConso: A layout wrapper for admin console pages that renders a titled header and a styled content container.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminDropd: A dropdown menu component for admin actions covering user management, marketplace oversight, financial reports, and system settings, with all items showing a 'Coming Soon' toast.
frontend/src/components/admin/analytics/: Presentational component that renders a grid of metric cards (revenue, sales, pending/failed payments, total transactions) from provided analytics data.
Admin panel that fetches marketplace analytics and renders SalesMetricsCards alongside detailed ratio stats, with loading/error/empty states and a refresh button.
frontend/src/components/admin/assistant/: Admin UI for viewing, searching, and inline-editing Q&A entries in the AI assistant's knowledge base, with save/cancel controls and toast notifications.
Admin card that lists questions the AI assistant could not answer, showing category suggestions and interaction counts with a refresh button.
frontend/src/components/admin/employees/: Admin panel with tabbed forms for recording manual and scheduled employee payments; backend integration is noted as pending and functionality is simulated.
frontend/src/components/admin/fees/FeeCo: Admin card for viewing and (stub) editing the per-sale marketplace service fee; the save action is disabled pending backend integration.
frontend/src/components/admin/financial/: Displays four financial overview cards (Available Balance, Payroll Savings, Credit Limit, Credit Used) using hardcoded correct cent values and data from AdminFinancialState, with loading skeletons and tooltips.
Admin card for depositing funds via Stripe Checkout, showing live Stripe account balance alongside the platform's available balance and a deposit amount input.
frontend/src/components/admin/Marketplac: Fetches and displays marketplace roadmap items with progress tracking, loading/error states, and a refresh button that triggers a dashboard data update mutation.
frontend/src/components/admin/messaging/: Placeholder admin messaging panel that displays a 'Coming Soon' notice and an empty state, with a non-functional Compose Message button that shows a toast.
Form component for composing and sending a message to a marketplace participant, with recipient select, subject input, and body textarea fields.
Displays a scrollable conversation thread between admin and a recipient, with avatar-aligned message bubbles and an inline reply textarea.
frontend/src/components/admin/payments/A: Admin panel for initiating Stripe Checkout sessions to collect marketplace sale fees and store builder subscription charges, with a Stripe configuration guard.
frontend/src/components/admin/payments/O: React component that manages the owner's Stripe Connect account setup, allowing creation of a connected account, onboarding via account links, and status refresh, with account ID persisted in localStorage.
frontend/src/components/admin/payments/P: Admin panel component that renders a card containing both the StripeSetupCard and OwnerStripeConnectCard components for configuring payment processors.
Admin payments panel that provides a form for initiating payouts to various recipient types (Stripe, employee, partner, etc.) and displays a local transaction history stored in localStorage.
frontend/src/components/admin/payments/S: Admin card component for configuring Stripe API keys, auto-configuring with live keys on first load if not already set, and displaying the current configuration status.
frontend/src/components/admin/RoleApplic: Displays pending role applications in a table and allows admins to approve or reject them, with loading and error state handling.
frontend/src/components/admin/transactio: Admin panel that displays transaction ledger entries and payouts in a tabbed table view, with status badges, currency formatting, and a hardcoded internal payroll savings ledger entry.
frontend/src/components/admin/transfers/: Admin transfer panel with a form for moving funds between sources (available balance, credit, payroll savings) and destinations (platform user, credit payback, payroll savings), with transfer history persisted in localStorage.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserRoleMa: Shows a summary of user roles (admins, users, guests) as stat cards by fetching role summary data, with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/assistant/Assist: A chat panel component for the ANC Assistant that supports multiple modes (Customer, Seller, etc.) with text input, speech recognition, and text-to-speech capabilities. Manages message history, voice settings, and escalation options.
A floating action button widget that toggles the AssistantChatPanel open/closed, fixed to the bottom-right corner of the screen.
frontend/src/components/auth/RequireAuth: A route guard component that ensures the user is authenticated and has a registered profile, redirecting to login or profile setup as needed.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component rendering a four-column grid with brand info, quick links, seller/business links, and policy/legal links using TanStack Router's Link component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component providing a sticky header with navigation, authentication controls (login/logout via Internet Identity), a role-based dashboard link, mobile sheet menu, and a Footer.
frontend/src/components/privacy/CookieCo: A fixed banner component that prompts users to accept or reject cookie usage, persisting their choice via a cookie consent utility and linking to the privacy policy.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog component that collects a new user's full name and email, saves their profile with a default or specified role via a mutation, and navigates on success.
frontend/src/components/RequireRegistere: Guard component that redirects authenticated users without a saved profile to the /profile-setup route, while allowing unauthenticated or fully registered users to render children normally.
frontend/src/components/RouterErrorScree: Displays a 'Page Not Found' error screen with options to refresh the page or navigate home, optionally showing an error message.
frontend/src/components/RuntimeErrorBoun: A React class-based error boundary that catches runtime errors and unhandled promise rejections, rendering a fallback UI with error details and a refresh button.
frontend/src/components/security/HumanCh: A dialog component that verifies the user is human via a checkbox and a simple math challenge (7+3) before allowing payment to proceed.
frontend/src/components/seller-onboardin: Defines the ordered list of seller onboarding step configurations (id, title, description, placeholder status) and helper functions to look up steps by index or id.
A multi-step onboarding wizard for sellers that tracks progress, saves state to the backend, and navigates between configurable onboarding steps.
frontend/src/components/seller/SellerPro: A reusable card component for displaying placeholder seller profile features with an icon, title, description, and an optional badge (defaulting to 'Coming Soon').
frontend/src/components/startup/LessonDe: A detail view component for a single lesson that renders its title, description, an optional embedded video, and HTML content, with a back button and a mark-as-complete action.
frontend/src/contexts/VoiceSettingsConte: A React context provider that combines microphone permission state and voice preferences (activation, spoken replies) into a single shared context for voice-related settings.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning an anonymous or authenticated actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAssistant.ts: Provides a mutation hook for asking an AI assistant questions by category, currently returning a placeholder message since the backend method is not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useMicrophonePermissi: Tracks and manages browser microphone permission state, providing functions to check, request, and retry microphone access via the Permissions API and getUserMedia.
frontend/src/hooks/usePageActivity.ts: Returns a boolean indicating whether the page is currently active/focused by listening to visibility change, focus, and blur events.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, access control, onboarding, admin dashboard, transactions, orders, and payouts using the ICP actor.
Returns a redirect path based on the authenticated user's active role, mapping each role (seller, customer, admin, etc.) to its corresponding dashboard route.
frontend/src/hooks/useSellerOnboarding.t: Provides query and mutation hooks for fetching and saving seller onboarding progress, with the save mutation currently unimplemented and throwing an error.
Wraps the browser's SpeechRecognition API into a React hook with start/stop/reset controls, transcript state, error handling, and optional continuous/restart modes gated by microphone permission.
frontend/src/hooks/useStripeBalance.ts: Fetches the Stripe account's available and pending USD balances directly from the Stripe REST API using a secret key, caching results for 30 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useStripeCheckout.ts: Provides a mutation hook that calls the backend to create a Stripe checkout session for given shopping items and redirects the user to the resulting Stripe payment URL.
frontend/src/hooks/useStripeConnect.ts: Provides React Query mutation hooks for creating Stripe Connect express accounts, generating account onboarding links, and retrieving connected account details via direct Stripe API calls.
frontend/src/hooks/useStripeDepositCheck: React Query mutation hook that calls the backend actor to create a Stripe Checkout session for deposits and redirects the user to the returned checkout URL.
frontend/src/hooks/useStripePayout.ts: React Query mutation hook that initiates a Stripe payout via direct API call and records the transaction in the backend actor, invalidating relevant balance queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useTextToSpeech.ts: React hook wrapping a TTS controller to expose speak, stop, and cancel functions along with speaking state and the currently spoken message ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useVoicePreferences.t: React hook that reads and writes voice preference settings (voice activation and spoken replies) to localStorage via the voicePreferences utility.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/components/utilities, CSS custom properties for the navy-blue theme, menu surface styles, animated logo gradient, and voice listening indicator animation.
frontend/src/lib/cookieConsent.ts: Utility functions to get, set, and check cookie consent status stored as a boolean string in localStorage.
frontend/src/lib/humanCheck.ts: Utility functions to verify, set, and clear a 30-minute human-check session flag stored in sessionStorage.
frontend/src/lib/policies.ts: Defines policy identifiers, metadata types, and a record of all site policies (privacy, shipping, returns, terms, marketplace) with their routes and version info.
frontend/src/lib/pricingCopy.ts: Exports pricing constants and copy strings for the marketplace ($5/sale fee) and optional Store Builder subscription ($10/month), including FAQ and display text.
frontend/src/lib/stripeConfig.ts: Centralizes Stripe configuration including publishable key, secret key, Connect account ID, and TypeScript interfaces for Stripe account, account link, and payout objects.
frontend/src/lib/voice/browserVoice.ts: Feature-detection utilities and factory functions for the Web Speech API, providing SpeechRecognition instance creation and a TTSController wrapper around SpeechSynthesis.
Manages versioned voice preference settings (voice activation, spoken replies) in localStorage with get/set helpers and default fallback values.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AccountPortalPage.tsx: Displays an authenticated user's account portal with profile overview, settings navigation, and links to other account sections like documents and preferences.
frontend/src/pages/AdminCenterPage.tsx: Admin-only page with tabbed interface covering financial overview, payments, transfers, transactions, accounts, analytics, employees, messaging, knowledge base, roles, and roadmap management.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page showing platform sections with status badges and a marketplace roadmap with progress indicators, plus a transfer panel and refresh control.
frontend/src/pages/AffiliateDashboardPag: Affiliate marketer dashboard displaying cards for referral links, commission tracking, performance analytics, and marketing resources along with a commission summary.
frontend/src/pages/AppCenterPage.tsx: App center page listing categorized third-party and internal apps (store builder, marketing, fulfillment, analytics) with launch handlers and availability badges.
frontend/src/pages/AppLaunchPage.tsx: Displays a detail/launch page for a specific app (ClickFunnels, Dropshipping, Template Selector) identified by route param, showing status, description, and action buttons for launch, configure, and uninstall.
frontend/src/pages/ApplyPage.tsx: Provides a role application form where authenticated users can select Employee or Admin roles and submit a reason; submission is stubbed with a timeout and toast notification.
frontend/src/pages/AppointmentDashboard5: Renders the ANC Apprentice Program scheduling page, embedding a Calendly iframe for booking appointments alongside program info cards.
frontend/src/pages/B2BDashboard.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/BusinessDashboardPage: Displays a business dashboard for authenticated users with six feature cards covering B2B Services, Business Credit, Team Management, Analytics, Integrations, and Documents.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerBlog.tsx: Lists static customer-facing blog posts (getting started, security tips, etc.) in a card grid with category badges, dates, and navigation to individual post pages.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerBlogPost.tsx: Renders a full blog post page by looking up the postId route param in a static record of posts, displaying the title, metadata, and paragraph content with a back-navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDashboardPage: Renders a grid of dashboard cards (Purchase History, Wishlist, Messages, Reviews, Profile, Settings) for authenticated registered customers.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerFAQ.tsx: Displays a customer-facing FAQ page with an accordion of common questions about ANC Electronics N Services, including pricing, payments, and support contact info.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerFavoritesPage: Empty file with no content or exports.
Shows a placeholder inbox page for customer-to-seller messaging, requiring authentication and displaying a 'coming soon' notice.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerProfileHome.t: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerPurchaseHisto: Displays a placeholder purchase history and order tracking page for authenticated users, with a 'coming soon' message.
Provides account settings for authenticated users, including voice feature toggles (voice activation, spoken replies) and microphone permission management.
Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/EmployeeDashboardPage: Renders a grid of dashboard cards (Tasks, Schedule, Payroll, Resources, Profile, Notifications) for authenticated registered employees.
frontend/src/pages/FunnelsPage.tsx: Displays a ClickFunnels affiliate partner page with sign-up and account links, plus an admin-only configuration panel for updating funnel partner URLs.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page for ANC Marketplace featuring a hero section, features grid, and calls-to-action for registration and service exploration.
frontend/src/pages/MarketplacePolicyPage: Static page displaying the ANC Marketplace policy covering seller responsibilities, buyer protection, fees, prohibited items, and dispute resolution.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Page shown after a failed or cancelled payment, listing common failure reasons and providing links to retry or return to the admin center.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Page shown after a successful payment, with separate views for deposit confirmations and general payment success, including navigation to financial overview or admin center.
frontend/src/pages/PciCompliancePage.tsx: Page displaying ANC's PCI DSS compliance certificate with options to view or download it, along with a description of what the certification means for users.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Static page presenting ANC's privacy policy covering data collection, usage, sharing, security, and user rights.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupPage.tsx: Page that guards profile setup behind authentication, redirecting unauthenticated users or those with existing profiles, and rendering the ProfileSetup component otherwise.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Multi-step registration page where users select a role (seller, customer, business, or marketer), authenticate via Internet Identity, and submit profile details to create an account.
frontend/src/pages/ReturnsPolicyPage.tsx: Displays a static Returns Policy page with sections covering eligibility, non-returnable items, return process, refund processing, and shipping costs.
frontend/src/pages/SellerDashboardPage.t: Renders a seller dashboard with placeholder stats (earnings, orders, shipping costs) and navigation cards linking to seller profile, payouts, and other seller sections.
frontend/src/pages/SellerOnboardingWizar: Wraps the SellerOnboardingWizard component inside an authentication guard to ensure only registered users can access the onboarding flow.
frontend/src/pages/SellerPayoutsPage.tsx: Provides a seller payouts UI with placeholder forms for saving a payout account and submitting debit/credit card requests, all with simulated async submission logic.
frontend/src/pages/SellerProfilePage.tsx: Displays a seller profile page with a grid of placeholder cards for upcoming features like store branding, account details, dashboard customization, and integrations.
frontend/src/pages/SellersBusinessesBlog: Renders a blog listing page for sellers and businesses, displaying a grid of hardcoded blog post cards with titles, excerpts, categories, and navigation to individual posts.
Displays individual seller/business blog post content looked up by postId from a hardcoded record, rendering the post's title, metadata, and paragraph content.
Renders a FAQ page for B2B sellers using an accordion layout, covering topics like B2B features, subscriptions, Store Builder, funnels, dropshipping, payments, and support.
frontend/src/pages/ShippingPolicyPage.ts: Displays a static shipping policy page covering shipping methods, costs, processing time, international shipping, and contact information.
frontend/src/pages/StartupDashboard.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports defined.
frontend/src/pages/StoreBuilderPage.tsx: Renders a Store Builder subscription page ($10/month) that lets authenticated users subscribe to convert their marketplace store into a standalone website or mobile app.
frontend/src/pages/StorePage.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports defined.
frontend/src/pages/TermsConditionsPage.t: Displays a static Terms & Conditions page covering acceptance of terms, account responsibilities, payments, intellectual property, and liability limitations.
frontend/src/types/index.ts: Defines all shared frontend TypeScript types and enums including user roles, profiles, products, orders, B2B services, store builder config, app integrations, and dropshipping partners.
frontend/src/types/speech.d.ts: Provides TypeScript type declarations for the Web Speech API (SpeechRecognition and related interfaces) which are not included in the standard TypeScript lib.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, border radii, box shadows, keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the ANC Marketplace project state including existing features, pending feature requests (notably configuring payment webhook calls to a Zapier endpoint), and architectural notes.
